examples.title: numbat — units & dimensional checking
examples.description: Build quantities, let arithmetic carry the dimensions, convert with .to(), and see the engine refuse a length + a speed. The core pint-shaped experience.

examples.title: numbat — uncertainty (Monte-Carlo with units)
examples.description: Propagate uncertainty through a real ore-block calculation (volume × density × grade), units intact, then collapse to mean / P10 contained metal.

examples.title: numbat — sweeps & dimensional solvers
examples.description: A one-axis sweep (pressure vs depth) and solvers that invert a dimensioned relation: sphere radius from volume, and a projectile range maximized over launch angle.
